steps.title: Identify the main focus
steps.content: The text introduces the Walt Whitman House, then identifies it as a museum, and describes what the museum does to help visitors connect with Whitman.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice A states “to describe a museum focused on Whitman's life and works” — the exact purpose the passage conveys.

Choices B, C, and D don't fit: the passage doesn't explain why readers enjoy his works, summarize his biography, or compare museums.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
